docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARKAS, SHANE AS TO DEFENDANT BUHLMANN, MARCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARKAS, SHANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUHLMANN, MARCO $1,060,768.00 PRINCIPAL, $16,275.78 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,077,478.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
